title: Director Mode Demo
script:
Welcome to Director Mode. You have full control over every scene.

[Visual: futuristic city with flying cars]
With Director Mode, you describe exactly what you want to see.

[Visual: close up of robot hand touching human hand]
Each [Visual: tag] becomes a scene with its own stock footage search.

[Visual: abstract data visualization with flowing lines]
You can even specify the mood and style of each visual.

[Visual: wide shot of a modern office with plants]
This gives you cinematic control over the entire video.
